commits: e442cc9 - bober(sprint-2): WHOOP egress axis + authenticated transport

filesChanged.description: Added 'device-connection' to EgressAxis; optional 3rd ctor param (=false) keeps 2-arg call sites byte-identical; fromConfig reads med?.egress?.deviceConnection ?? false; ternary -> exhaustive switch with never-guard default.
sc-2-2 (three-axis union + deviceConnection flag + fromConfig default false) and sc-2-3 (independence matrix) describe blocks; existing sc-6-5 suite unchanged.
WhoopTokenStore: clientCredentials() env read + clear throw; readRefreshToken()->string|undefined; writeTokens() 0600 sidecar. NO network imports.
env save/restore throw tests; mkdtemp+fs.stat 0600; read absent/present/corrupt/missing-field.

WhoopClient (2nd ESLint-excepted net file): assertAllowed-first ensureAccessToken (refresh_token grant + rotate persist) + fetchPage (cursor pagination, 401->refresh+retry-once, 429->injected waiter(reset*1000)+retry); injectable FetchLike/waiter/nowIso; v2 endpoint routing.
Fixture FetchLike + recording waiter: axis-off throw + 0 calls; pagination cursor walk; 401-refresh-retry-once + second-401-throws; 429 Reset->waiter->retry; all 4 collection paths.
Added src/medical/whoop/whoop-client.ts to network-exception files array (ONLY that file).

notes: All 7 criteria met. 2438->2473 (+35). 3rd EgressGuard ctor param OPTIONAL so 2-arg sites source-compatible. URLSearchParams not in ESLint globals -> manual query strings w/ encodeURIComponent (matches medline-source.ts). nowIso() injector defaults to () => new Date().toISOString() (no Date.now() inside impl). whoop-token.ts has NO network import; only whoop-client.ts is ESLint-excepted.
